# Contributing

Thank you for your interest in contributing to this project!

Please follow these guidelines before opening a Pull Request:

- Open PRs against the `main` branch.
- Format Terraform code: `terraform fmt -recursive`.
- Run `terraform init` and `terraform validate` before creating a PR.
- Use descriptive branch names, e.g. `feature/your-change` or `fix/your-bug`.
- CI and publishing pipelines run in Azure DevOps; do not modify or migrate them here.
- Describe the change in the PR and link any related issues.

Thank you for your contribution!
